description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a stylized Viking character with a round body and short limbs. It features a brown Viking helmet adorned with prominent white horns and a detailed golden beard covering the lower face. The toy is dressed in a textured brown outfit with lighter cuffs and boots, giving it a rugged, adventurous appearance. The face is expressive, with wide eyes and a neutral mouth, and the helmet is detailed with metallic accents. The overall construction appears soft and plush, with stitched seams visible along the arms and legs. The toy's proportions are exaggerated, with a large head and short, stubby arms and legs, making it appealing and huggable for children.
description: A plush Viking character toy with a horned helmet, golden beard, and brown outfit, featuring a soft, rounded body and expressive face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Viking's face, horned helmet, golden beard, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, horn, and beard, with the arm and leg visible in silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, both horns, and the full back of the brown outfit with outstretched arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet's horn, beard profile, and the side of the body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, open eyes and a straight mouth, giving a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides and legs slightly apart.
